task_description: Rewrite LTX_PRO.py into a unified Infinite Flow Engine integrating Easy Prompt logic from LTX2EasyPromptLD.py and LTX2VisionEasyPromptLD.py, with enhanced character consistency, T4 VRAM optimization, voice sync foundations, SVI-Pro chained extension improvements, and a complete story-to-prompt workflow.

verification.summary: AST parse succeeds. All 10 required classes present. All 117 functions present. v2 review issues resolved: (1) _LAST_FLOW_STATE module variable stores FlowState for Cell 9 access, (2) _build_negative_prompt includes explicit-content, wide-shot, and multi-character negative categories, (3) PersistentLatentSeed.set_reference returns early with _noise_tensor=None for non-Tensor inputs preventing F.interpolate crash.
